title: The Ethical Dilemma: Balancing Individual Freedom and Social ...
content: In a world increasingly marked by global connectivity and vast cultural diversity, the tension between individual liberty and socialresponsibilitybecomes ever more pronounced. This conflict, central to the philosophy of John Stuart Mill, invites us to consider the delicate interplay between personalfreedomand the collective good. Mill, a prolific thinker of the 19th century, provides a ...
